title: cestrum racemosum var. grande
intro: Cestrum racemosum var. grande, also known as the flowering night-blooming cereus, is a flowering plant species that is native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Cestrum racemosum var. grande include its ability to alleviate anxiety and insomnia due to its sedative properties, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
